isi.lyrics:
Lyric flow blow - Spotlight

Romanization

Nowhere but spotlight,
I'm holding you in the spotlight
There's no place but the spotlight, I wanna be with you all my life
I wanna believe, wanna believe in my feelings

Light fills you in the room, from the skylight
Even that feels like a spotlight
I wanna be with you all of my life
I wanna believe, wanna believe in your heart

The time has come, it's true, I'll let go of
what was built on someone else's words
You never sold me
You make me bold, see?
Thinkin' about when you'll be mine

Waiting for the heartbeat
You started up my healing
Stuck here in my feelings
Why don’t you shape me like that?


Nowhere but spotlight,
I'm holding you in the spotlight
There's no place but the spotlight, I wanna be with you all my life
I wanna believe, wanna believe in my feelings

isi.lyrics:
Lyric flow blow - invisible

Romanization

Oh, I fell off, fell off the roof
wanted someone to stop me
lost in the fall
I thought I could rise above it all
I was sure I could break free from it all

I just wanna stay invisible
don’t want to let you see me break
I just wanna stay invisible
afraid of what you'd take

isi.lyrics:
Lyric flow blow - Second to me

Romanization

You don’t have to hold back, just talk to me
There’s no need to be stubborn, just talk to me
The only thing you can do is talk to me, talking to me
I could put you after me
If you need a way out, follow me, just talk to me.
Keep up with me, and you’ll be on top for me
Wanna go with me? You can talk to me, just talk talk talk talk talk talk talk

Baby, getting too tense
Tired of your baggage
On this journey, I have known myself
And I'm growing, and you'll feel it

Days I look out through my phone
2AM, claiming you love me
On this journey, I have known myself
And I'm growing, and you'll feel it

Hangeul

You don’t have to hold back, just talk to me
There’s no need to be stubborn, just talk to me
The only thing you can do is talk to me, talking to me
I could put you after me
If you need a way out, follow me, just talk to me.
Keep up with me, and you’ll be on top for me
Wanna go with me? You can talk to me, just talk talk talk talk talk talk talk

Baby, getting too tense
Tired of your baggage
On this journey, I have known myself
And I'm growing, and you'll feel it

Days I look out through my phone
2AM, claiming you love me
On this journey, I have known myself
And I'm growing, and you'll feel it

isi.driveFileNames: Shin Hyun Woo - 못해 이별 (Can’t Say Goodbye).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Shin Hyun Woo - 못해 이별 (Can’t Say Goodbye)

Romanization

heeojijaneun mareul kkeonaeneun neol
barabomyeo amu mal mot haesseo

chagapgiman han neoui geu numbicheun
da pogihan deut chimchakhae boyeo

modeun geol matchwojudeon neoyeosseonneunde
oneureun nae mamdo majuchiji ana

datugirado haji
ani yogirado haji
ibyeol ape chabunhage
chagaun nega duryeowo

tteonaji ma naegada jalmothaesseo
neoreul saranghago isseo
jebal nareul pogihaji ma
mothae ibyeol

naengjeonghan ne pyojeonge nae gaseumi apa
neol ireoge mandeureoseo deo mianhae

datugirado haji
ani yogirado haji
ibyeol ape chabunhage
chagaun nega duryeowo

tteonaji ma naegada jalmothaesseo
neoreul saranghago isseo
jebal nareul pogihaji ma
mothae ibyeol

nan mollasseosseo nega himdeunji
naega neol oeropge han geonji
modu gochilge nal doraseoji ma

datugirado haji
ani yogirado haji
ibyeol ape chabunhage
chagaun nega duryeowo

tteonaji ma naegada jalmothaesseo
neoreul saranghago isseo
jebal nareul pogihaji ma
mothae ibyeol

Hangeul

헤어지자는 말을 꺼내는 널
바라보며 아무 말 못 했어

차갑기만 한 너의 그 눈빛은
다 포기한 듯 침착해 보여

모든 걸 맞춰주던 너였었는데
오늘은 내 맘도 마주치지 않아

다투기라도 하지
아니 욕이라도 하지
이별 앞에 차분하게
차가운 네가 두려워

떠나지 마 내가다 잘못했어
너를 사랑하고 있어
제발 나를 포기하지 마
못해 이별

냉정한 네 표정에 내 가슴이 아파
널 이렇게 만들어서 더 미안해

다투기라도 하지

Lyric W2RDO - Winter Wish

Romanization

jongsoriga deulliumyeon
baradeon modeun ge irwojyeo
eojeneun naeillo deopgo
seulpeumeun sarangeuro bakkwo

oraeorae nae mamsoge
ganjikhan sowoneul noraehae
rarallara rararalla
Say happy new year to dear my love

hwanhan naeiri ojana
uulhan ireun da ijeobeoryeo
jujeohaneun dajimdeurui
gomineun ije geumanduja

umcheuryeotdeon maeumsoge
ganjikhan yonggireul pureonae
Can you hear this melody?
Say happy new year to dear my love

nege seolleneun iri
yunanhi neomchige doel tenikka
jumuneul georeojulge!
irwojyeora Bibbidi-Bobbidi-Boo

sulleongineun gaseumsogeul
dallaejul i norae ttara hae bwa
rarallara rararalla
Say happy new year to dear my love

irugo sipeun modeun il
baraneun daero heulleogagil
jinagan sangcheoneun itgo
ttadeuthan haengbogeul mannagil

haruharu ssayeoganeun
sojunghan nareul deo akkigil
rarallara rararalla
Say happy new year to dear my love

Happy new year to dear you!


Hangeul

종소리가 들리우면
바라던 모든 게 이뤄져
어제는 내일로 덮고
슬픔은 사랑으로 바꿔

오래오래 내 맘속에
간직한 소원을 노래해
라랄라라 라라랄라
Say happy new year to dear my love

환한 내일이 오잖아
우울한 일은 다 잊어버려
주저하는 다짐들의
고민은 이제 그만두자

움츠렸던 마음속에
간직한 용기를 풀어내
Can you hear this melody?
Say happy new year to dear my love

네게 설레는 일이
유난히 넘치게 될 테니까
주문을 걸어줄게!
이뤄져라 Bibbidi-Bobbidi-Boo

술렁이는 가슴속을
달래줄 이 노래 따라 해 봐
라랄라라 라라랄라
Say happy new year to dear my love

이루고 싶은 모든 일
바라는 대로 흘러가길
지나간 상처는 잊고
따듯한 행복을 만나길

하루하루 쌓여가는
소중한 나를 더 아끼길
라랄라라 라라랄라
Say happy new year to dear my love

Happy new year to dear you!

Romanization

oneul bam mundeuk barabon
geu aekja soge nalgeun sajinen
aetdoen eolgullo namaseo
nal dajeonghage banggyeojuneyo
geuttae nan eoryeotgo neomuna meoreotgie
nal wihae apaon naldeureul mollatjyo
dwidoraboge doeneyo
geuttaeui nareul
oneul bame nae mam jeonhaebolkkayo
saranghanda mareul haji mothaeseo
neul meomutgeorideon
geu maeumdo geudae asil tejyo
jeonhaejiji anneun naui maeumi
daeul su itdorok
i noraee sireo bonaelgeyo
neul bakge geudae saraon
geu seoreoun siganeul arayo
oneul bam jinago tto naeiri ondamyeon
geu maeumeul na jogeumeun alkkayo
saranghanda mareul haji mothaeseo
neul meomutgeorideon
geu maeumdo geudae asil tejyo

(jeonhaejiji anneun naui maeumi)
(daeul su itdorok)
(i noraee sireo bonaelgeyo)
jeonhaji mothan maeumi isseoyo
geudael saranghaeyo
geu mal hagikkajiga neujeonneyo

Hangeul

오늘 밤 문득 바라본
그 액자 속에 낡은 사진엔
앳된 얼굴로 남아서
날 다정하게 반겨주네요
그때 난 어렸고 너무나 멀었기에
날 위해 아파온 날들을 몰랐죠
뒤돌아보게 되네요
그때의 나를
오늘 밤에 내 맘 전해볼까요
사랑한다 말을 하지 못해서
늘 머뭇거리던
그 마음도 그대 아실 테죠
전해지지 않는 나의 마음이
닿을 수 있도록
이 노래에 실어 보낼게요
늘 밝게 그대 살아온
그 서러운 시간을 알아요
오늘 밤 지나고 또 내일이 온다면
그 마음을 나 조금은 알까요
사랑한다 말을 하지 못해서
늘 머뭇거리던
그 마음도 그대 아실 테죠
전해지지 않는 나의 마음이
닿을 수 있도록
이 노래에 실어 보낼게요
(사랑한다 말을 하지 못해서)
(늘 머뭇거리던)
(그 마음도 그대 아실 테죠)
(전해지지 않는 나의 마음이)
(닿을 수 있도록)
(이 노래에 실어 보낼게요)
전하지 못한 마음이 있어요
그댈 사랑해요
그 말 하기까지가 늦었네요

isi.albums: Embers (ARC WORLD TOUR 2025-2026 FINALS Official Anthem)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric KARDI - Embers (ARC WORLD TOUR 2025-2026 FINALS Official Anthem)

Romanization

No one leads you here
Shut all the noise out
Just face it now

No words can ever say
How many you’ve fallen
And still you stand over your fate


No time to hesitate
You be your light
Can’t feel your legs or head but hold on tight
Don’t forget what you’ve longed for
It’s calling on you


Can you feel the fire inside
Once everything burns down
It turns to a cry

Already know what they’ve been waiting for
Fall to the ground but it won’t take you away from your star
Say this is mine, prove who you are


Gather here, boyeojwo who’s got the best shot
Let the world hear your roar through the wall
Woh-oh, Woh-oh
butjaba challaui slowdown
machimnae shout your name out loud
Echoes fill the air


Feel your fire, your own desire
Make it higher Till it Breaks

Now’s the time, Prove yourself

I never thought fall in love again

domuji ampullideon maeum
arajul geomman gateun chakgaginggeolkka

All you want it

musimhan cheok haedo ajik moreulgeol

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Moon Sujin - SERENADE (feat. Joh!)

Romanization

Your touch is like a melody, soft and slow
Whispering secrets only we could know
Every glance, every move, it feels so gold
No hesitating, sigani eopdago
(Ay)
Neon lights paint the city with my luck (luck)
mwodeun hae boyeojul su itdamyeon
Your love’s a rhythm I cannot control
han gajiman gieokhaejwo

Oh, you’re my heartbeat serenade
gomawo, mideojun ge
Up so high, I can’t come down
You make me insane

Your voice, the only sound that my heart obeys
We don’t need no words when my music plays

Oh, you’re my heartbeat serenade
You make me insane

Got me stayin’ up all night
Tell me you’re by my side
Then I hope you see
You’re the one I need

We don’t need no more rhymes
Just say the stories
All about we

I might be chosen
We can’t slow it down, keep

Movin’ your body
It’s just gettin’ started
Yeah, you’re the reason why
I never stop this

Come around here
We’re just gettin’ started

Give me more reasons
I keep movin’ for

Oh, you’re my heartbeat serenade
gomawo, mideojun ge
Up so high, I can’t come down
You make me insane
